title: Dire Strait: US tells Europe that Hormuz is ‘not our problem’
summary_full: 'Apparently in the eyes of Trump it’s no longer: "If I break it, I fix it," but "I break it, and the EU will fix it",' one diplomat said
summary_public: 'Apparently in the eyes of Trump it’s no longer: "If I break it, I fix it," but "I break it, and the EU will fix it",' one diplomat said
